action.reasoning: Observation: ConvNeXt-Tiny with GCE loss achieved 0.7838 accuracy in just 5 epochs. Analysis: GCE loss is effective against the 40% label noise. To further improve robustness and generalization, I will add Mixup/CutMix and Exponential Moving Average (EMA). Mixup prevents memorization of noisy labels, and EMA provides a stable, smoothed model. I will increase training to 20 epochs since we have plenty of time (20 epochs should take ~35 mins). Decision: Update train.py with Mixup, EMA, and 20 epochs, then evaluate.
